text.title: Solo Change Order Decision Tree
text.summary: Tree mapping master-SOW + threshold + jurisdiction + signature signals to send / escalate / pause.

decision-tree.root-question: master_sow with name + date + identifier exists?

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology; write fresh SOW; CO requires a parent agreement
escalate: full SOW renegotiation; CO is for small modifications only

branch.question: e-signature enforceable (US E-SIGN / EU eIDAS / UK ECA)?

conclusion.verdict: escalate to real signature; CO is not valid without enforceable acceptance

branch.question: reply YES captured within 8 verbal-authorization hours?

conclusion.verdict: send + store immutable + invoice with co_id reference
pause: send one-line confirm-or-stop; halt work past 8 verbal hours until signed

text.example: msa=acme-2026-q2-001 → ask=$1,200 sub-threshold → US E-SIGN → reply YES captured at 2026-05-10 → store immutable + invoice INV-2026-05-12-L3.
